title: Batoru Academia
description: Enroll in the Academia, climb the ranks and train to be the best. A mod about cool weapons, trading cards and battles.
body:
# Batoru Academia

Enroll in the Academia, climb the ranks and train to be the best. A mod about cool weapons, trading cards and battles.

![Getting Started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NuttiesNuts/batoru/refs/heads/master/.github/assets/GettingStarted.png)

Start by obtaining the **Student Gauntlet**, which serves as your main device in the Academia.

Collect **Spell Cards** and equip them by using them with the gauntlet equipped.

Cast the spell by pressing the _spell cast_ key with the card equipped.

Alongside spells, **Batoru Academia** adds weapons with special abilities.


![Rank System](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NuttiesNuts/batoru/refs/heads/master/.github/assets/RankSystem.png)

Once the gauntlet is equipped you will have your current rank shown above your nameplate.

Current ranks are: **F -> D -> C -> B -> A -> S**

---

Most values in the mod like damage and spell properties can be changed in the mods config located at `config/batoru/*.toml`

Configuration files for the mana bar can be located in the `config/manaattributes` folder.

Check out other submissions for **Modfest 26**!

<iframe width="280" height="157" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qKSX5tvgsBI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
